ch7_start.text: The dark veins on your arm are pulsing. You need a doctor, now. You rush to the Medbay, but the heavy blast doors are sealed. A biohazard warning flashes in bright red: 'TOXIC SPORE CONTAMINATION'.

choices.text: Override the door lock and enter.

ch7_medbay_enter.text: You force the doors open. The air inside is thick with green, glowing spores. Crew members are strapped to beds, writhing and coughing up a black fluid. Dr. Aris is frantically mixing chemicals at her station, ignoring the suffering around her.

choices.text: Confront Dr. Aris about the infection.

ch7_confront_aris.text: You show her your arm. 'What is this? Why didn't you call Corporate for a quarantine team?' She drops a vial, shattering it on the floor. She looks terrified, but also strangely defiant.
ch7_confront_aris.speaker: Dr. Aris

ch7_aris_hubris.text: 'Corporate would have just purged the station!' she screams. 'I can cure this! I just need more time. These spores... they're rewriting DNA. It's fascinating. I thought I could control it.' You notice the vials on her desk are mislabeled; she's been experimenting blindly.
ch7_aris_hubris.speaker: Dr. Aris

choices.text: 'Your hubris is going to kill us all.'

ch7_end.text: There is no cure here, only a desperate doctor playing god. Suddenly, the station shudders violently, and the ventilation fans grind to a halt. A high-pitched squealing echoes through the vents above you.
